title: Start With You
theme: Build yourself before you build your business

learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Build yourself before you build your business
learn.summary: RA-SPIKE starts with you — not product, not clients. Everything else follows.
bullets: RA-SPIKE flips traditional training: You → Purpose → Business → Clients → Impact
Your 8-week journey: Discover (W1–3), Business Plan & Pitch (W4), Advise (W5–7), Advisor Revalida (W8)
Employee → Self-employed → Financial entrepreneur — you are the CEO of your future
Week 1 opens the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas (FEC) on the YOU block only: Vision, Purpose, Values, Strengths, Goals
learn.callout: Read before Day 1 class. Your coach will expand these themes live with the Week 1 deck.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Day 1 classroom: Start With You
workshop.summary: Facilitated welcome, reflection, motivation poll, mindset, FEC intro, and Dream Board launch.
bullets: Welcome to a different kind of Rookie Academy — Build Yourself, Build Your Business, Build Your Legacy
Silent reflection: What kind of life do you want to build? Write it down
Quick poll: Why do people become financial advisors? (Income, Freedom, Family, Purpose, Career, Entrepreneurship, Helping Others, Legacy)
Entrepreneur mindset walkthrough and FEC preview — today we only begin with YOU
Dream Board workshop: choose images and words, create a collage, focus on what matters most to you
workshop.callout: Mark complete after your Day 1 classroom session. Coaches use the Week 1 Day 1 presentation deck.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Your assignment before Week 2
assignment.summary: Finish your Dream Board and prepare the personal inputs that feed Week 2.
bullets: Finish your Dream Board — add final images, words, and notes that capture your ideal life
Write your future-self letter — from you 3 years from now to you today (specific and inspiring)
Bring one printed photo (or have it ready digitally) that represents your biggest dream
Think about one group of people you would genuinely enjoy helping
assignment.callout: Your Dream Board is the first input into the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas. There are no wrong dreams.

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What did you discover about yourself?
reflection.summary: Capture insights from Day 1 before you submit the week.
prompts: What kind of life do you want to build — in one sentence?
What is your top reason for becoming a financial advisor?
Which Dream Board image or word surprised you most?
Where are you today on the path from employee to financial entrepreneur?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 1 complete
submit.summary: Confirm Learn, Workshop, Assignment, and Reflection are done so Week 2 can unlock.
bullets: Your Dream Board is saved to your profile as FEC input #1 (YOU)
Bring your future-self letter and one dream photo to Week 2
Next week we discover your ideal customer
